summary: Company formation website project. User wants to add business services (VAT Registration, PAYE Registration) under a 'Services' menu, referencing competitor sites for inspiration.
architectural_notes: Services menu should include business service offerings (e.g. VAT Registration, PAYE Registration) similar to 360companyformations.co.uk and yourcompanyformations.co.uk

existing_features.title: Add a 'VAT Registration' entry to the services catalog in `frontend/src/features/services/servicesCatalog.ts` under a new or existing 'compliance' or 'tax' category, with a title, description, price, and relevant feature list covering: mandatory vs voluntary registration, VAT scheme options (Standard, Flat Rate, Cash Accounting), submission to HMRC, VAT number provision, and ongoing support guidance — modelled on competitor offerings at https://360companyformations.co.uk/ and https://www.yourcompanyformations.co.uk/account/.

Add a 'PAYE Registration' entry to the services catalog in `frontend/src/features/services/servicesCatalog.ts` under the same compliance/tax category, with a title, description, price, and relevant feature list covering: employer PAYE scheme registration with HMRC, employer reference number provision, NI and income tax setup guidance, and payroll compliance notes.

Create a new dedicated service detail page `frontend/src/pages/services/VATRegistrationServicePage.tsx` for VAT Registration, presenting the service benefits, a clear description of what is included, pricing, and a call-to-action. Follow the same layout pattern used in `RegisteredOfficeServicePage.tsx` and `BusinessSupportServicePage.tsx`.

Create a new dedicated service detail page `frontend/src/pages/services/PAYERegistrationServicePage.tsx` for PAYE Registration, presenting the service benefits, a clear description of what is included, pricing, and a call-to-action. Follow the same layout pattern as other service pages.

Register the two new routes `/services/vat-registration` and `/services/paye-registration` in `frontend/src/App.tsx`, pointing to `VATRegistrationServicePage` and `PAYERegistrationServicePage` respectively.

Update the Services dropdown/navigation in `frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayout.tsx` to include links for 'VAT Registration' (pointing to `/services/vat-registration`) and 'PAYE Registration' (pointing to `/services/paye-registration`) alongside existing service links.

Update the services overview page `frontend/src/pages/ServicesPage.tsx` to include cards for 'VAT Registration' and 'PAYE Registration', consistent in style with the existing service category cards, each linking to their respective detail pages.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add VAT Registration service under the 'Services' menu
Add PAYE Registration service under the 'Services' menu
